## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] One feature/fix per PR
- [ ] Conventional commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (`make test` passes; backend needs Docker)
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] If DB schema changed: migration + `make sqlc-generate` run, and discussed with maintainer first
- [ ] No new dependency added without prior discussion
